abilities.name: Crowd Control
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" may not declare enemy-controlled actions unless it is their activation.

abilities.name: Quick Study
abilities.text: This model gains the keywords of the friendly leader.

abilities.name: Tempting Fate
abilities.text: Once per game. When a friendly master is killed, this model may drain two (soulstone). If it does so, deal 4 irreducible damage to this model, then the friendly master heals 4.

actions.name: Brutal Blade
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is not within 1", this action receives a (-).

triggers.name: Heave
triggers.text: Place the target anywhere within 3" of this model.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

actions.name: A Cage for All
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Enemy models within range must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or gain a Slow token.

triggers.name: Powerful Visage
triggers.text: A friendly model within 3" of this model gains a Focused token.

triggers.name: Into the Cage
triggers.text: Once per activation. Choose an enemy model within range. Deal 2 damage to the chosen model, then this model heals 2.
